turn.speaker: 架构师老王
turn.content: 好的，我们现在来设计这个智能协作系统的基础架构。首先，我们需要奠定三个核心支柱：用户界面层、API层和命令系统层。这三个模块将构成整个系统的基座。

metadata.alignment_note: All 6 turns (1-6) discuss the three core groups (User Interfaces, API Layer, Command System) and their nodes (TG, WA, FA, MW, RT, CH, BCH, IMCH, MDCH). Turn 6 serves as the transition trigger to the next stage.

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

turn.speaker: 开发小李
turn.content: 明白了，那用户界面层这边我们先放哪些组件呢？我看到TG、WA、FA这些节点，它们分别代表什么类型的界面模块？

metadata.alignment_note: All 6 turns (1-6) discuss the three core groups (User Interfaces, API Layer, Command System) and their nodes (TG, WA, FA, MW, RT, CH, BCH, IMCH, MDCH). Turn 6 serves as the transition trigger to the next stage.

turn.speaker: 架构师老王
turn.content: TG是问题追踪界面，WA是Wiki页面界面，FA是冲刺待办列表界面，MW是看板界面，RT是聊天室界面。这些构成了我们最基础的用户交互入口。

metadata.alignment_note: All 6 turns (1-6) discuss the three core groups (User Interfaces, API Layer, Command System) and their nodes (TG, WA, FA, MW, RT, CH, BCH, IMCH, MDCH). Turn 6 serves as the transition trigger to the next stage.

turn.speaker: 开发小李
turn.content: 好的，那命令系统层呢？CH和BCH这两个节点是做什么的？它们和其他界面组件有什么关联？

metadata.alignment_note: All 6 turns (1-6) discuss the three core groups (User Interfaces, API Layer, Command System) and their nodes (TG, WA, FA, MW, RT, CH, BCH, IMCH, MDCH). Turn 6 serves as the transition trigger to the next stage.

    CH["Groupware_ChatRoom"]

turn.speaker: 架构师老王
turn.content: CH是命令帮助Wiki页面，BCH是命令看板。命令系统负责接收用户指令并路由到相应的处理模块。IMCH和MDCH分别用于问题追踪和冲刺待办相关的命令管理。

metadata.alignment_note: All 6 turns (1-6) discuss the three core groups (User Interfaces, API Layer, Command System) and their nodes (TG, WA, FA, MW, RT, CH, BCH, IMCH, MDCH). Turn 6 serves as the transition trigger to the next stage.

turn.speaker: 开发小李
turn.content: 我理解了，API层作为中间桥梁连接用户界面和后端逻辑。现在核心层已经搭建完成，接下来我们需要扩展哪些能力？

metadata.alignment_note: All 6 turns (1-6) discuss the three core groups (User Interfaces, API Layer, Command System) and their nodes (TG, WA, FA, MW, RT, CH, BCH, IMCH, MDCH). Turn 6 serves as the transition trigger to the next stage.

turn.speaker: 架构师老王
turn.content: 现在要加入AI能力。我们新增第四个核心分组：AI模型系统层。这将赋予系统智能理解和生成的能力。DOCH、EXCH、CBH这些节点会处理与AI模型交互的待办事项。

turn.speaker: 开发小李
turn.content: CACHES是缓存系统吗？DOCKER和DCOMPOSE应该是容器化部署相关的组件，ENV和PROC呢？

metadata.alignment_note: All 5 turns (21-25) discuss the final groups (Database & Storage, Infrastructure) and their nodes (SDE, AIDG, DB, CACHES, DOCKER, DCOMPOSE, ENV, PROC). Turns 24-25 summarize and conclude the complete architecture.

turn.speaker: 架构师老王
turn.content: 完全正确，CACHES是缓存聊天室，DOCKER是容器化的问题追踪，DCOMPOSE是编排待办管理。ENV是环境配置看板，PROC是进程管理的看板。这样整个41节点的架构就完整了。

turn.speaker: 开发小李
turn.content: 总结一下，我们的五层架构分别是：用户界面与命令系统层、AI模型系统层、媒体与多模态层、记忆协作与文档层，以及最后的数据库存储与基础设施层。总共10个分组，41个节点。
